name_en: Burberry's latest runway shoulder bag💕 crafted from selected soft leather. The front flap features a brand embossed logo, inspired by the collar shape of the classic Trench coat, making its debut at Burberry's 2022 Fall/Winter Women's Collection. 24 x 5.5 x 17.5cm
